channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump's address to Congress showed the country's stark partisan divide
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A president's speech to Congress — even without the formal gloss of a State of the Union address — is typically a time for a call to national unity and predictable claims about the country being strong. But that wasn’t President Donald Trump’s plan.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN and AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rep. Al Green shouts down Trump and may face censure by the House for the outburst
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Democratic Rep. Al Green of Texas wasn’t the first lawmaker ever to blurt out a shout of protest during a presidential address to Congress. But he's perhaps the only one in recent memory to actually be ejected from the hall Tuesday night by the Speaker of the House.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump praises major government cutbacks, efficiency measures
item.description: The president singled out specific spending programs, including an $8 million program promoting LGBTQI+ initiatives in Lesotho.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation

item.title: Trump's trade war draws swift retaliation with new tariffs from Mexico, Canada and China
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump launched a trade war Tuesday against America’s three biggest trading partners, drawing immediate retaliation from Mexico, Canada and China and sending financial markets into a tailspin as the U.S.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, PAUL WISEMAN and ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump clashes with Democrats at testy joint address
item.description: Trump spoke to lawmakers for more than one hour and 39 minutes, breaking a record for the longest such speech delivered in modern history.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Suspect in Kabul airport bombing during Afghanistan pullout is caught and heading to US, Trump says
item.description: President Donald Trump says a suspect in the suicide bombing at the Kabul airport that killed 13 American service members during the chaotic U.S. withdrawal from Afghanistan has been taken into custody and is being brought to the United States to face charges.
item.dc:creator: Eric Tucker And Zeke Miller, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 13-year-old cancer survivor earns standing ovation as he becomes Secret Service agent during Trump speech
item.description: A 13-year-old cancer survivor named DJ Daniel was honored by President Trump during his speech to Congress on Tuesday night and made a Secret Service member.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump honors lives of Laken Riley, Jocelyn Nungaray while celebrating strides on securing border
item.description: President Donald Trump honored the lives of Laken Riley and Jocelyn Nungaray during his speech before a joint session of Congress.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Washington, DC, to remove 'Black Lives Matter' painting from street near White House, mayor says
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The nation's capital city will remove the large painting of the words “Black Lives Matter” on a street one block from the White House as Washington Mayor Muriel Bowser struggles to fend off threats of encroachment from both President Donald Trump and the Republican-controlled Congr
item.dc:creator: ASHRAF KHALIL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump declares 'America is back' in speech before Congress
item.description: President Donald Trump traveled to Capitol Hill Tuesday evening to deliver his first address before a joint session of Congress since his return to the Oval Office in January.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Florida governor spotlights timely golf outing he and Casey DeSantis had with President Trump
item.description: As the 2026 race to succeed Ron DeSantis as Florida governor heats up, with Byron Donalds announced and Casey DeSantis mulling a bid, President Trump plays golf with the Sunshine State's first couple
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: House GOPers hope Trump keeps door to mineral deal open for Ukraine despite Oval Office dispute
item.description: House Republicans said the proposed minerals deal between the U.S. and Ukraine should stay on the table despite the explosive Oval Office meeting Friday between President Donald Trump and Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lawmakers reveal top issues they want Trump to hammer home during joint address to Congress
item.description: Members of Congress told Fox News Digital on Capitol Hill what they hope to hear from President Donald Trump during his joint address to Congress on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: In polarized times, these Minnesota legislators want to restore civility at the state Capitol
item.description: This year’s legislative session started with a lot of vitriol between DFLers and Republicans. But a bipartisan group of legislators is trying to get both sides to be more collaborative and civil.
item.dc:creator: Catharine Richert, MPR News

item.title: Federal judge reverses Trump firing of federal employees' appeal board chairwoman
item.description: Cathy Harris, a Democrat who led the Merit Systems Protection Board (MSPB) until she was fired by President Donald Trump last month has been ordered reinstated to her position by a federal judge.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Canada may halt electricity exports to US over Trump tariffs
item.description: Canadian Premier Doug Ford has threatened to cut off electricity exports to the US if President Trump's tariffs are enacted.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Vance's comments about European peacekeeping plan for Ukraine draw ire abroad
item.description: Vice President Vance said the best security guarantee for Ukraine is to sign a mineral deal with the United States.
item.dc:creator: Franco Ordoñez, MPR News

item.title: Trump vows to press ahead on reshaping America in speech to Congress as Democrats register dissent
item.description: President Donald Trump vowed to keep up his campaign of “swift and unrelenting action” in reorienting the nation’s economy, immigration and foreign policy as he delivered an unyielding address Tuesday night to Congress and the nation.
item.dc:creator: Zeke Miller, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Twin Cities meteorologist concerned about Trump cuts to NOAA
item.description: “I do worry about public safety,” Twin Cities meteorologist Paul Douglas told MPR News of the cuts to the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration. The concerns go beyond tornado warnings, he added. “It's the safety of our aviation system, shipping, agriculture.
item.dc:creator: Cathy Wurzer and Gracie Stockton, MPR News

item.title: Minnesota lawmakers get budget update that won’t include full scope of Trump federal pullbacks
item.description: Legislators are already weighing the ways they might have to bridge budget gaps if federal officials cut funding streams to Minnesota. A new economic forecast is released on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Nevada's Cortez Masto slams Trump administration cuts amid bird flu response
item.description: Democratic Nevada Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto criticized the Trump administration Thursday, saying recent terminations are worsening the federal government’s response to the bird flu outbreak and the rise price of eggs.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Nevada Gov. Lombardo, AG Ford clash on immigration policies ahead of potential 2026 matchup
item.description: Republican Nevada Gov. Joe Lombardo and Democratic Nevada Attorney General Aaron Ford -- who could face off in the 2026 gubernatorial election -- swapped jabs in competing statements regarding guidance about immigration enforcement.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News
